title: Runtime Models — Tier-to-Model Map
description: Parsed shape of reference/runtime-models.md — the per-runtime tier→model adapter source-of-truth shipped in Phase 26 (D-01..D-03). Consumed by scripts/lib/install/parse-runtime-models.cjs at install time and scripts/lib/tier-resolver.cjs at runtime. Strict enums catch typos at install time, not at runtime. Schema versioned via $schema_version for forward-compat (D-03).

$schema_version.description: Top-level schema version (D-03). Bump on breaking changes; downstream consumers must check before parsing.

id.description: Runtime ID. MUST match one of the 14 runtime IDs exported from scripts/lib/install/runtimes.cjs (Phase 24 D-02 lock).

single_tier.description: When true, the runtime exposes a single model that maps to all three tiers (D-02). Downstream consumers (router, budget-enforcer) may render a UI affordance noting tier-selection has no cost effect for this runtime.

tier_to_model.description: Map of canonical Anthropic tier names (D-03) to the runtime's concrete model identifier. All three keys are required even when single_tier=true (assign the same model three times).

reasoning_class_to_model.description: Map of runtime-neutral reasoning-class names (D-10 alias) to the runtime's concrete model identifier. Equivalence with tier_to_model is enforced by Phase 26-08 frontmatter validator (high↔opus, medium↔sonnet, low↔haiku).

provenance.description: Source citations for this runtime's tier map. At minimum one entry pointing at the runtime-author docs URL plus retrieval timestamp + last-validated cycle. Phase 13.2 authority-watcher uses this to flag drift.

source_url.description: URL of the runtime-author documentation that authoritatively names the tier→model mapping. Placeholder URLs prefixed with `<TODO: confirm at ...>` are acceptable for v1.26 ship and flag the row as researcher-fill-needed.

retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the source URL was retrieved.

last_validated_cycle.description: GDD cycle ID that last validated this row (e.g. '2026-04-29-v1.26').

note.description: Optional inline note (e.g. 'TODO: confirm at runtime-author docs', 'single-tier runtime — same model x3').

model.description: Public model name as documented by the runtime author.

provider_model_id.description: Optional internal/provider model ID for runtimes whose API identifiers differ from the public name (D-03).
